title: Diary of a Shinjuku Thief
overview: In Tokyo's Shinjuku district, the lives of a young man prone to theft, a young woman he meets at a bookstore, and a kabuki actor intersect.

trailers.title: DIARY OF A SHINJUKU THIEF by OSHIMA Nagisa - Japanese Film Festival Singapore 2010
